commentText: Shawn Cousins • Dec '25So I’m interested in drop shipping can someone help me what direction I should go

tags.reasoning: I'm asking a question to learn more about his situation.

reply: Consistency will only help you succeed if you're doing the right things over and over brother. If you're just blindly running in the wrong direction, consistency can dig you a very deep grave. Have you been learning and researching at all about dropshipping at this point?
